sections.description: Prometheus-compatible HTTP query API and embedded Vue.js SPA dashboard for time series querying, metadata retrieval, and visualization.
sections.purpose: Wires the Prometheus PromQL engine to the metrics store's Queryable adapter, exposing all standard Prometheus HTTP API endpoints for time series querying and metadata retrieval. Also serves an embedded Vue.js SPA dashboard at /dashboard/ via Go embed.FS for visualizing Claude Code activity metrics with charts and heatmaps.
sections.strengths:
- Full Prometheus API compatibility - implements all standard /api/v1 endpoints (query, query_range, series, labels, label values, metadata, buildinfo)
- Robust parameter parsing - handles both RFC3339 and Unix timestamp formats for time parameters, supports Go duration, Prometheus duration suffixes (d, w, y), and seconds notation for step
- Comprehensive error handling - distinguishes between query cancellation, timeout, storage, and execution errors with appropriate Prometheus error types
- Clean dependency injection - constructor takes logger, queryable, engine, lookbackDelta, and build info; no global state
- Dashboard served as proper Vue.js SPA via embed.FS + http.FileServerFS with /dashboard redirect to /dashboard/
- HTTP middleware chain - logging middleware captures method, path, status, duration, and bytes written; CORS middleware allows cross-origin access
sections.weaknesses:
- Metadata endpoint stub - /api/v1/metadata returns empty object rather than actual metric metadata
- No input validation for max samples or memory limits - relies entirely on engine configuration
- Missing query validation warnings - doesn't surface potential issues like large time ranges to clients
- CORS allows all origins (*) - acceptable for internal tooling but would need tightening for production exposure
sections.test_coverage: High test coverage with parallel subtests for: instant query (GET and POST), range query, range query with Prometheus day step (1d), series endpoint, series endpoint with missing match[], label names, label values, metadata, buildinfo, invalid query syntax, missing parameters, range query missing params, CORS headers on regular requests, CORS preflight (OPTIONS) handling, dashboard redirect (301 /dashboard → /dashboard/), and dashboard SPA serving (200, HTML content type, body contains title). Uses testify assert/require and helper functions (newTestAPI, seedStore, doGet, doPost, parseResponse).
sections.dependencies:
- github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels - label manipulation
- github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql - PromQL engine for query execution
- github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/parser - metric selector parsing
- github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage - Queryable interface for data access
- embed - Go embed.FS for dashboard/dist directory
- io/fs - fs.Sub to serve embedded SPA subtree
- internal/store - provides Queryable adapter (store.NewQueryable) and in-memory store for testing
- log/slog - structured logging
sections.functionality:
- Instant Query (/api/v1/query) - single point-in-time metric values with optional time parameter (defaults to now)
- Range Query (/api/v1/query_range) - time series data over range with required start, end, step parameters
- Series (/api/v1/series) - find all series matching label selectors via match[] parameter
- Label Names (/api/v1/labels) - list all label names in database with optional start/end time range
- Label Values (/api/v1/label/{name}/values) - list all values for a specific label with optional time range
- Metadata (/api/v1/metadata) - returns empty object (placeholder for metric metadata)
- Build Info (/api/v1/status/buildinfo) - version, revision, branch, build date, Go version
- Dashboard SPA (/dashboard/) - serves embedded Vue.js SPA from dashboard/dist/ via embed.FS + http.FileServerFS; /dashboard redirects to /dashboard/ with 301
- Prometheus Duration Parsing - supports d (day), w (week), y (year) duration suffixes in addition to Go durations and raw seconds
- HTTP Handler - registers all routes on http.ServeMux, supports both GET and POST with form-encoded parameters
- Logging Middleware - wraps handler to log method, path, status code, duration, and bytes written for every request via slog
- CORS Middleware - sets Access-Control-Allow-Origin/Methods/Headers on all responses; handles OPTIONS preflight with 204 No Content
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| api.go | Main API implementation with all endpoint handlers, embedded SPA serving via embed.FS + http.FileServerFS, parameter parsing helpers (including Prometheus duration), response formatting, error classification, and HTTP middleware |
| api_test.go | Comprehensive test suite covering all endpoints, dashboard redirect and SPA serving, Prometheus duration step parsing, error cases, and parameter validation |
| dashboard/dist/ | Vite build output (gitignored) — index.html, CSS, JS assets embedded at compile time via //go:embed dashboard/dist |
